به ویژگی یا بخشی اشاره دارد که به فرهنگ یا منطقه خاصی مربوط است.

text: to the game called 'tag' or 'it' which schoolchildren play. One person is 'it' and has to catch the others. In kabaddi, a 'raider' from one team tries to tag a player from the other team and then return to their own half of the field

There is an unusual sport which describes itself as a 'classic mix of

text: . The game, called 'chess boxing', involves a round of chess and then a round of boxing, then another of chess, and so on. There is one minute between rounds. The first chess boxing world championship

explanation: عبارتی رسمی برای اشاره به برگزاری یک رویداد.

explanation: عبارتی رایج برای بیان توسعه آهسته در طول زمان.
